name: Stockfish chess engine
license: GPL-3.0-or-later. Use as a local external engine unless GPL obligations are intentionally handled.
notes: Metadata only. The repository does not download or bundle Stockfish.

name: KataGo Go engine
license: MIT license for engine source; neural network/model files may have their own terms.
notes: Metadata only. Configure a local KATAGO_PATH for analysis.

name: AlphaZero self-play reinforcement learning paper
license: Research paper metadata only; no model weights or article text are bundled.
notes: Reference for policy/value self-play and search-guided learning.

name: Accelerating Self-Play Learning in Go
license: Research paper metadata only; no model weights or article text are bundled.
notes: Reference for Go ownership/value feature learning and efficient self-play.

name: Edax Reversi engine
notes: Metadata only. Configure a local EDAX_PATH for analysis.

name: WTHOR Reversi game files
notes: User-provided local files only; derived opening statistics can be regenerated locally.

name: MoHex 2.0 pattern-based MCTS Hex player
license: Research paper metadata only; no model weights or article text are bundled.
notes: Reference for Hex MCTS, pattern priors, and virtual-connection-aware search.

name: Benzene Hex framework
license: LGPL project; code is not bundled here unless reviewed separately.

name: PettingZoo Chinese Checkers research environment
license: Verify repository license before code reuse.
notes: Metadata reference for multi-agent training ideas; do not copy code without license review.

name: Chinese Checkers heuristics, MCTS, and reinforcement learning reference
license: Research paper metadata only; no model weights or article text are bundled.
notes: Reference for jump-chain, rollout, and self-play heuristics.

name: Scid chess database tool
license: GPL software; bundled sample databases may have separate terms.
